name: BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from SNMP senders or receivers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver
the event QID is one of the following (1159448) Custom User 9 - Event CRE
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver
AND the event QID is one of the following (1159448) Custom User 9 - Event CRE
